code: import React from"react";import{PieChart,Pie,Cell,Tooltip,Legend}from"recharts";import{useCurrency}from"../theme/useCurrency";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const COLORS=["#4CAF50","#2196F3","#FF9800","#9C27B0","#FF5722","#607D8B"];const IncomeCategorySummary=_ref=>{let{incomes}=_ref;const{currency}=useCurrency();const categoryTotals=incomes.reduce((acc,inc)=>{acc[inc.category]=(acc[inc.category]||0)+inc.amount;return acc;},{});const data=Object.keys(categoryTotals).map(cat=>({name:cat,value:categoryTotals[cat]}));if(data.length===0){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Add income to see category breakdown."});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"category-summary",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Income by Category"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"chart-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(PieChart,{width:400,height:300,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Pie,{data:data,cx:"50%",cy:"50%",labelLine:false,label:entry=>`${entry.name}: ${currency} ${entry.value}`,outerRadius:80,fill:"#8884d8",dataKey:"value",children:data.map((entry,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Cell,{fill:COLORS[index%COLORS.length]},`cell-${index}`))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tooltip,{formatter:value=>`${currency} ${value}`}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Legend,{})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"category-list",children:data.map(cat=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:cat.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:[currency," ",cat.value]})]},cat.name))})]});};export default IncomeCategorySummary;
